name: Southwest Soft Tacos
recipeIngredient: -broccoli, corn and red peppers, or other Southwest blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the frozen mixed vegetables for 5 minutes.
2. Microwave the corn tortillas for 20-30 seconds until they are hot and soft.
3. Top each tortilla with an equal amount of the cooked vegetables, salt, and pepper.
4. Add a teaspoon of your favorite salsa or picante sauce.
5. If desired, add sprouts on top.
6. Fold the sides of the tortilla inward to create a compact taco shape.
7. Eat immediately for a quick and easy meal.
